title: Intriguing Earthy British Mushroom Pasta
description: A hearty and earthy pasta dish featuring British mushrooms and ayurvedic-sattvic friendly ingredients, made with 00-flour and dehydrated mushrooms for added depth of flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Reconstitute the dried porcini mushrooms by soaking them in hot water for 20 minutes.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the 00-flour, reconstituted porcini mushrooms, and a pinch of salt.
Gradually add in the olive oil and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Roll out the dough into a thin sheet and cut into fettuccine-style noodles.
In a large skillet, saute the sliced button mushrooms and chopped onion in olive oil until they are tender.
Add the minced garlic and dried thyme to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Combine the cooked noodles and mushroom mixture, and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
